title: 2026-06-21 Shino Weekend Port Town
summary: Twelve-image Shino weekend character day album, using the ChatVoyageIntime references as i2i identity guidance across her apartment, harbor market, old town, aquarium, bar, tram, pool, and Sunday-night desk.
summaryJa: 架空の港町のアルバム。構成は室内、マーケット、水辺、街歩き。

images.alt: Shino on Saturday morning by a high window in her old merchant-house apartment, wearing a black inner, loose lavender shirt, ivory shorts, and smoky socks while waiting for coffee
images.title: 01 Home morning window coffee
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / home / Shino 25
images.locationDetail: Saturday morning by a high window in her old merchant-house apartment

images.alt: Shino in the old apartment lobby with pale aqua blouse, black mini skirt, lavender socks, loafers, fish guide, headphones, and bag charms
images.title: 02 Home lobby bag fish guide
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / home / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino at the old harbor market after rain, wearing a white blouse, black short wrap bottom, pale blue cardigan, lavender socks, Mary Janes, and jellyfish charm while looking at a fish stall
images.title: 03 Market harbor fish stall
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / market / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino reading at a seaside cafe in a black floral dress with a white cardigan, coffee, book, and old harbor water outside
images.title: 04 Resort seaside cafe reading
images.tags: Soft Anime / Fictional Port City / resort / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino lost in a Nuremberg-like old town lane, wearing a white shirt, black mini skirt, lavender socks, loafers, and crossbody bag while checking a folded map
images.title: 05 Street old town lost map
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / street / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino at old city wall ruins above the sea, wearing a pale aqua sleeveless top, black wide trousers, and a windblown white shirt
images.title: 06 Travel city wall sea hill
images.tags: Soft Anime / Fictional Port City / travel / Shino 25
images.locationDetail: old city wall ruins above the sea

images.alt: Shino entering the port-town aquarium in the evening, wearing a black sleeveless jumpsuit, white cardigan, silver loafers, and jellyfish charm
images.title: 07 Gallery aquarium evening entry
images.tags: Soft Anime / Fictional Port City / gallery / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino sitting in an aquarium tunnel under blue jellyfish light, wearing a black jumpsuit with a white cardigan and silver loafers while watching one fish for a long time
images.title: 08 Gallery aquarium tunnel watch
images.tags: Soft Anime / Fictional Port City / gallery / Shino 25
images.locationDetail: aquarium tunnel under blue jellyfish light

images.alt: Shino at a quiet warehouse bar after the aquarium, wearing a black sleeveless top, lavender-gray open shirt, ivory short bottom, smoky socks, and blue glass pendant
images.title: 09 Lounge warehouse bar after aquarium
images.tags: Digital Painting / Fictional Port City / lounge / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino riding a slow Sunday tram by the sea after a long weekend, wearing a white top, black cropped trousers, pale blue cardigan on her lap, and crossbody bag with jellyfish charm
images.title: 10 Transit Sunday tram seaside
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / transit / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino at a seaside pool in her summer switch moment, wearing an elegant black one-piece swimsuit, loose white shirt, blue pendant, and fish hair clip
images.title: 11 Swim seaside pool summer switch
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / swim / Shino 25
images.locationDetail: seaside pool in her summer switch moment

images.alt: Shino at her Sunday night desk sorting Monday lab notes, fish guide, DJ flyer, headphones, and testing tools while wearing a black knit top, lavender cardigan, and relaxed trousers
images.title: 12 Home Sunday night Monday notes
images.tags: Digital Painting / Fictional Port City / home / Shino 25
